tagline: Connectivity surface — a self-managing offline banner or a full-page hard stop.
whenToUse: Offline State handles lost connectivity in two modes. The banner is an ambient FxAlert warning ("You're offline — changes will sync when reconnected") with an optional retry; it can auto-manage itself by reading navigator.onLine and the online/offline events, hiding while online and politely announcing "Back online" before it auto-dismisses on reconnect. The page mode is a hard stop that delegates to FxErrorPage code="offline" for when the app genuinely cannot proceed. Detection wiring is ultimately the host's responsibility — this component owns presentation and announcements. All connectivity access runs inside an effect, so it is SSR-safe and static-renders as the visible banner.
